Changelog:

2026/4/7: Added a new scenario, I like cherry blossom

I don’t what to say but, at first glance I already knew she will be my favorite character, I can’t resist the combination of flower-loving and gentle characters

I want her so badly, please cygames just release her already okay?? 😭

She hasn’t released yet as I mentioned earlier so some of the personality and setting for this character is based on assumption, apologize if anything is inaccurate

...also why no one reminds me when I forgot to add lorebook for Fine Motion bot :/

Anyways, hope you enjoy chatting with this bot and have a good day!

Next bot is probably... Custom Trainer Bot or Seiun Sky (since I already made Nishino Flower bot)
